users.title: User
users.description: Represents a student or teacher user in the school banking system

username.description: Lowercase unique login name of the user

role.description: Role of the user, either 'teacher' or 'student'

name.description: Full display name of the user

accountNumber.description: Simulated bank account number (starts with ES)

balance.description: Active virtual balance of the account in Euros

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user was created

transfers.title: Transfer
transfers.description: Represents a simulated bank transfer between two users

senderName.description: Full name of the sending user

senderAccount.description: Account number of the sending user

receiverName.description: Full name of the receiving user

receiverAccount.description: Account number of the receiving user

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the transfer took place

systemLogs.title: SystemLog
systemLogs.description: An audit log entry of user actions and system changes

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the log was recorded

config.title: Config
config.description: Global configuration settings for the bank simulation

value.description: Stringified value of the configuration option

/transfers/{transferId}.description: Log of transfers made between bank accounts

/system_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trail log entries of bank actions
